records.ety: [OE. ortographie, OF. orthographie, L. orthographia, Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ writing correctly; 'orqo`s right + gra`fein to write. See Ortho-, and Graphic.]

defs: The art or practice of writing words with the proper letters, according to standard usage; conventionally correct spelling; also, mode of spelling; as, his orthography is vicious.
quotes: When spelling no longer follows the pronunciation, but is hardened into orthography.

defs: The part of grammar which treats of the letters, and of the art of spelling words correctly.
A drawing in correct projection, especially an elevation or a vertical section.
The method of spelling the words of a particular language; the system of symbols used for writing a language.
The branch of linguistics concerned with how languages are written.
